description.value: Subpages Mutated Bloodlines - Everyman Gaming, LLC Nine-Tailed Bloodline Nogitsune Bloodline Mutated Bloodlines - Legendary Games New Wildblooded Sorcerer Bloodline Eldritch (Wildblooded Bloodline) Mutated Bloodlines - Paizo Anarchic Arial Bedrock Brutal Dark Fey Empyreal Envenomed Groveborn Karmic Lifewater Linnorm Pit-Touched Primal Retribution Rime-Blooded Sage Sanguine Seaborn Shahzada Sylvan Umbral Visionary Void-Touched Warped A wildblooded sorcerer has a mutated version of a more common bloodline, with one arcana and at least one bloodline power that are different from those of an unmutated bloodline. When creating a wildblooded sorcerer, select an existing bloodline, then select one of the following mutated bloodlines associated with that bloodline. Use the normal bloodlineâs class skill, bonus spells, and bonus feats, and the mutated bloodlineâs bloodline arcana. Use the normal bloodlineâs bloodline powers, except when the mutated bloodline replaces one of those powers.
